proposed_claim_kr: 본 설계는 Holter형 장시간 ECG를 위한 다중 시간축 SNN-inspired 4-class 분류 accelerator IP이다
proposed_claim_en: The design is a Holter-oriented long-window multi-timescale SNN-inspired four-class classification accelerator IP
limitations: Holter-oriented and SNN-inspired are architectural descriptions, not clinical certification or deep-SNN claims

proposed_claim_kr: 디지털 인터페이스는 1 kSPS signed 12-bit two's-complement ECG stream을 사용한다
proposed_claim_en: The digital interface uses a 1 kSPS signed 12-bit two's-complement ECG stream
limitations: stream convention, not accelerator throughput

proposed_claim_kr: 60초 Snapshot Readout과 30개 Snapshot의 Final Membrane 누적을 결합한다
proposed_claim_en: The architecture combines a 60-second Snapshot Readout with Final Membrane accumulation over 30 snapshots
limitations: one final decision corresponds to the configured 30-minute window

proposed_claim_kr: locked final-test 30분 chunk 정확도는 29/36=80.56%이다
proposed_claim_en: Locked final-test 30-minute chunk accuracy is 29/36=80.56%
limitations: public-dataset engineering result; database-class confounding remains

proposed_claim_kr: final-test record-majority 정확도는 16/19=84.21%이다
proposed_claim_en: Final-test record-majority accuracy is 16/19=84.21%
scope: 19 source records aggregated from the same final-test partition
limitations: not an independent test set

proposed_claim_kr: validation 32/32는 model-selection 결과이다
proposed_claim_en: Validation 32/32 is a model-selection result
limitations: must never be stated as final generalization accuracy

proposed_claim_kr: final test는 모델 선택에 사용되지 않았고 lock 후 1회 평가되었다
proposed_claim_en: The final test was not used for selection and was evaluated once after lock
limitations: repository-declared and artifact-traceable protocol

proposed_claim_kr: pure RTL 구현은 LUT 9719 FF 5038 BRAM 0 DSP 0을 사용한다
proposed_claim_en: The pure RTL implementation uses 9719 LUTs 5038 FFs 0 BRAM and 0 DSP
limitations: device/tool/configuration specific; not a speed or energy benchmark

proposed_claim_kr: pure RTL 구현의 WNS는 8.184 ns이다
proposed_claim_en: The pure RTL implementation has WNS of 8.184 ns
limitations: timing closure evidence, not processing latency

proposed_claim_kr: MicroBlaze full-replay system은 LUT 12494 FF 8494 BRAM 16 DSP 3이며 setup WNS는 0.097 ns이다
proposed_claim_en: The MicroBlaze full-replay system uses 12494 LUTs 8494 registers 16 BRAM and 3 DSP with 0.097 ns setup WNS
limitations: not pure accelerator resource and not board latency

proposed_claim_kr: board replay final_pred와 final_mem은 각각 36/36 일치했다
proposed_claim_en: Board replay final_pred and final_mem each matched 36/36 cases
scope: FPGA replay vs XSim expected outputs
limitations: functional equivalence only; label accuracy remains 29/36

proposed_claim_kr: AFE-generated final-test 입력은 board-replay 입력과 SHA256 36/36 동일하다
proposed_claim_en: AFE-generated final-test inputs are SHA256-identical to board-replay inputs for 36/36 chunks
limitations: byte identity only; does not prove classification correctness

proposed_claim_kr: canonical sample_gap_cycles=2에서 AFE-to-RTL final_pred와 final_mem은 36/36 bit-exact이다
proposed_claim_en: At canonical sample_gap_cycles=2 AFE-to-RTL final_pred and final_mem are bit-exact for 36/36 chunks
limitations: noncanonical fast debug cadence is excluded; equivalence is not accuracy

proposed_claim_kr: emu-XMODEL 36세그먼트 평균 RMS 차이는 1.95 LSB이고 lag는 0이다
proposed_claim_en: The mean emulator-to-XMODEL RMS difference over 36 segments is 1.95 LSB with zero lag
limitations: model-to-model agreement; local QRS slope deviations remain

proposed_claim_kr: 대표 NSR CHF ARR AF nominal MATLAB record의 clipping ratio는 모두 0%이다
proposed_claim_en: Representative NSR CHF ARR AF nominal MATLAB records all have 0% clipping
limitations: not all records and not physical measurement

proposed_claim_kr: strict source-record-wise split은 동일 source record의 partition 중복을 방지한다
proposed_claim_en: Strict source-record-wise splitting prevents the same source record from crossing partitions
limitations: does not eliminate database-to-class confounding

proposed_claim_kr: record leakage 방지와 database-class confounding 해소는 같은 것이 아니다
proposed_claim_en: Preventing record leakage is not the same as eliminating database-class confounding
limitations: requires same-acquisition or cross-domain validation in future

proposed_claim_kr: Nexys A7-100T에서 36개 전체 입력의 실보드 counter와 36/36 final prediction 및 144/144 final membrane 정합을 검증했다
proposed_claim_en: All 36 inputs were verified on a Nexys A7-100T with hardware counters plus 36/36 final-prediction and 144/144 final-membrane equivalence
evidence_type: measured board counter benchmark import audit
limitations: active-core latency is derived from measured total and input-wait counters; integrated-system timing and physical board power are not measured

proposed_claim_kr: 본 결과는 임상적으로 검증된 진단이다
proposed_claim_en: These results constitute clinically validated diagnosis
limitations: no clinical cohort or medical-device validation

proposed_claim_kr: physical AFE PCB ADC silicon 또는 fabricated SoC를 검증했다
proposed_claim_en: A physical AFE PCB ADC silicon or fabricated SoC was validated
limitations: only MATLAB and XMODEL model-based analog evidence exists

proposed_claim_kr: board equivalence 36/36이므로 분류 정확도는 100%이다
proposed_claim_en: Classification accuracy is 100% because board equivalence is 36/36
limitations: board equivalence is 36/36 while label accuracy is 29/36

proposed_claim_kr: 상용 wearable medical product보다 임상적으로 우수하다
proposed_claim_en: The design is clinically superior to commercial wearable medical products
limitations: evaluation conditions and intended use are not comparable

proposed_claim_kr: 본 pure RTL accelerator는 1,800,000-sample 전체 raw input window를 저장하지 않고 sample-by-sample 방식으로 고정 크기 event/state와 Final Membrane을 갱신한다
proposed_claim_en: The pure RTL accelerator updates fixed-size event/state and Final Membrane sample by sample without storing the complete 1800000-sample raw input window
limitations: does not quantify exact inference-state total or MicroBlaze runtime memory; avoided full raw-input window storage is 2700000 decimal bytes

proposed_claim_kr: 대표 네 class nominal MATLAB record의 최소 rail headroom은 1.019633440086 V이다
proposed_claim_en: The minimum rail headroom across the four representative nominal MATLAB records is 1.019633440086 V
limitations: selected nominal records only; not population-wide or physical rail measurement

proposed_claim_kr: XMODEL PLI stress의 RMS residual은 60 Hz에서 0.92 mV이고 50 Hz에서 118 mV이다
proposed_claim_en: XMODEL PLI-stress RMS residual is 0.92 mV at 60 Hz and 118 mV at 50 Hz
scope: 0.5 V common-mode plus 1 mV differential modeled PLI after settling
limitations: design target is 60 Hz; 50 Hz requires retuning and separate system verification; not physical measurement

proposed_claim_kr: XMODEL worst-direction R/C mismatch에서 CMRR은 0.1%에서 100.7 dB이고 1%에서 80.0 dB이다
proposed_claim_en: Under worst-direction XMODEL R/C mismatch CMRR is 100.7 dB at 0.1 percent and 80.0 dB at 1 percent
limitations: 30-minute final_pred was not directly swept in full XMODEL; classification robustness is not claimed

proposed_claim_kr: 대표 네 class 30분 chunk의 ADC non-ideal locked RTL regression에서 final_pred는 15/16 유지되고 2 LSB rms noise의 NSR 한 건이 변했다
proposed_claim_en: In representative four-class 30-minute ADC-nonideal locked-RTL regression final_pred was preserved for 15 of 16 cases with one NSR change under 2 LSB rms noise
scope: four representative chunks times four perturbation categories
limitations: representative stress regression only; does not prove invariance under all ADC non-idealities

proposed_claim_kr: 공칭 AFE ADC chain은 0.482287706339 Hz HPF 3-op-amp IA gain 201 active Twin-T 60 Hz notch 150.146172728 Hz LPF와 ±1.65 V 12-bit 1 kSPS ADC로 정의된다
proposed_claim_en: The nominal AFE ADC chain is defined by a 0.482287706339 Hz HPF a three-op-amp IA with gain 201 an active Twin-T 60 Hz notch a 150.146172728 Hz LPF and a plus-minus 1.65 V 12-bit 1 kSPS ADC
evidence_type: MATLAB parameter reference and fixed XMODEL RTL
limitations: model-defined values; not measured component tolerance or physical circuit performance
allowed_report_sections: AFE ADC 설계; MATLAB nominal 검증; 시스템구성

proposed_claim_kr: active Twin-T MATLAB dense sweep의 60 Hz attenuation은 -83.5556869284 dB이고 local -3 dB bandwidth는 11.721 Hz이며 estimated Q는 5.11901714871이다
proposed_claim_en: The active Twin-T MATLAB dense sweep gives minus 83.5556869284 dB attenuation at 60 Hz a local minus 3 dB bandwidth of 11.721 Hz and an estimated Q of 5.11901714871
limitations: not a measured physical attenuation or Q; 50 Hz attenuation is only -1.13121616922 dB
allowed_report_sections: AFE ADC 설계; MATLAB nominal 검증; 결과

proposed_claim_kr: fixed XMODEL은 IA solver 수렴 notch loading LPF cutoff CMRR margin ADC log alignment와 passive-notch bandwidth 문제를 수정한 정본이다
proposed_claim_en: The fixed XMODEL is the corrected implementation for IA solver convergence notch loading LPF cutoff CMRR margin ADC log alignment and passive-notch bandwidth issues
evidence_type: direct XMODEL RTL and verification report
limitations: implementation corrections in a model-based environment; not physical silicon debug evidence

proposed_claim_kr: XMODEL finite-GBW stress에서 100 kHz GBW의 ECG 차이는 2.04 code이고 VOS 0.5 1.0 2.0 mV는 약 203 405 810 mV의 출력 baseline 이동을 만들며 2 mV까지 clipping 0이다
proposed_claim_en: In XMODEL finite-GBW stress a 100 kHz GBW changes ECG by 2.04 codes while VOS of 0.5 1.0 and 2.0 mV shifts the output baseline by about 203 405 and 810 mV with zero clipping through 2 mV
scope: dominant-pole and differential VOS behavioral model
limitations: not transistor-level op-amp characterization; final_pred was not directly swept for these cases

proposed_claim_kr: 분류 입력 60초 chunk 1200개에서 ADC clipping은 0이고 full-record 35.9 billion samples의 modeled clip ratio는 0.00007 percent이다
proposed_claim_en: ADC clipping is zero over 1200 classifier-input 60-second chunks and the modeled clip ratio over 35.9 billion full-record samples is 0.00007 percent
scope: derived AFE emulator classifier inputs and full-record streams
limitations: not physical ADC headroom measurement; three full records contain rare modeled rail events

proposed_claim_kr: 공개 digitized ECG 기반 AFE 분석에서 R-peak shift 중앙값은 1.0 ms이고 RR interval error 중앙값은 0.0 ms이다
proposed_claim_en: In the AFE analysis based on public digitized ECG the median R-peak shift is 1.0 ms and the median RR-interval error is 0.0 ms
limitations: algorithmic peak matching on public digitized ECG; not clinical morphology validation

proposed_claim_kr: 통합 저장소에 XMODEL-aligned LTspice AFE+ADC/S&H graphical schematic과 generated netlist가 존재한다
proposed_claim_en: The integrated repository contains the XMODEL-aligned LTspice AFE plus ADC and sample-hold graphical schematic and generated netlist
limitations: schematic-level evidence only; not physical PCB transistor-level post-layout or silicon measurement

proposed_claim_kr: 24시간 Holter형 관찰이 설계 동기지만 MIT-BIH Arrhythmia Database의 30분 excerpt를 포함한 서로 다른 길이의 공개 원천을 동일 조건으로 비교하기 위해 현재 Final Membrane과 평가 창은 30분으로 고정했다
proposed_claim_en: Although 24-hour Holter-style observation motivates the architecture the current Final Membrane and evaluation window are fixed at 30 minutes so sources of unequal duration including the MIT-BIH Arrhythmia Database half-hour excerpts can be compared under the same real-data duration
evidence_type: official dataset description and locked implementation configuration
limitations: 30 minutes is a dataset-constrained engineering comparison window; it is not clinically equivalent to or a substitute for 24-hour Holter monitoring
allowed_report_sections: 서론; 데이터셋과 평가; 디지털 구조; 한계

proposed_claim_kr: Amirshahi와 Hashemi의 STDP/R-STDP ECG 연구는 R-peak 주위 개별 심박의 진폭을 spike train으로 변환하고 STDP와 reward/punishment R-STDP로 심박 클래스를 판정한다
proposed_claim_en: The Amirshahi and Hashemi STDP/R-STDP ECG study amplitude-encodes an individual R-peak-centered heartbeat into spikes and classifies the heartbeat with STDP and reward/punishment R-STDP
limitations: not long-record Snapshot aggregation; no accuracy comparison to this project

proposed_claim_kr: Bauer 등의 연구는 연속 ECG에서 병리 패턴이 나타난 순간을 이진 신호로 알리지만 장시간 기록 전체를 NSR CHF ARR AF 가운데 하나로 분류하지는 않는다
proposed_claim_en: Bauer et al. detect the presence of a pathological pattern in continuous ECG with a binary trigger rather than assigning an NSR CHF ARR or AF class to the whole record
limitations: binary pathological-pattern detection; not record-level four-class classification

proposed_claim_kr: Chen 등의 ISCAS 연구는 ECG 변화 순간을 LC-ADC event로 만들고 SCNN으로 N SVEB VEB F 개별 심박 클래스를 판정하지만 장시간 기록 전체를 분류하지는 않는다
proposed_claim_en: The Chen et al. ISCAS study turns ECG level crossings into events and classifies individual beats as N SVEB VEB or F rather than classifying a long record
evidence_type: IEEE conference paper and author manuscript
scope: event-driven input compression and beat classification
limitations: simulation-based individual-beat output; no long-record classification

proposed_claim_kr: Shanmugam 등의 MIL 연구는 대부분 정상인 약 48시간 ECG에서 위험도가 높은 일부 구간을 모아 환자의 미래 심혈관 사망 위험을 예측한다
proposed_claim_en: The Shanmugam et al. MIL study identifies high-risk portions within mostly normal approximately 48-hour ECG and aggregates them into future patient-level cardiovascular-death risk
limitations: conceptually similar sparse-window aggregation but the output is future risk rather than the current ECG record class

proposed_claim_kr: Zihlmann 등의 연구는 9 to 61 second ECG를 normal AF other noisy 네 클래스로 판정하지만 수시간 기록에서 간헐적 질환 구간을 찾아 장시간 판정으로 연결하는 연구는 아니다
proposed_claim_en: Zihlmann et al. classify 9-to-61-second ECG as normal AF other or noisy rather than searching hours-long recordings for intermittent disease windows
limitations: four-class ECG exists but the research question is short-record classification rather than intermittent long-record aggregation

proposed_claim_kr: 2026년 npj Digital Medicine의 DeepHHF는 24시간 Holter를 30초 구간으로 나누고 구간별 정보를 Transformer로 통합해 환자의 5년 심부전 위험을 예측하며 장시간 구간 통합 흐름은 본 연구와 가장 유사하다
proposed_claim_en: DeepHHF divides 24-hour Holter ECG into 30-second windows and aggregates window information with a Transformer to predict five-year heart-failure risk making its long-window aggregation flow the closest reviewed precedent
limitations: structurally similar long-window aggregation but future HF risk is a different research question from current NSR CHF ARR AF record classification

proposed_claim_kr: 본 연구의 핵심은 장시간 Holter ECG를 순차 Snapshot으로 처리하고 간헐적으로 강한 질환 증거의 강도 출현 빈도 반복성과 장시간 일관성을 고정 폭 RTL 상태에 누적해 기록 단위 NSR CHF ARR AF 클래스를 판정하는 것이다
proposed_claim_en: The core contribution is a streaming architecture that processes long Holter ECG as sequential snapshots and accumulates the strength frequency repetition and long-term consistency of intermittent disease evidence in fixed-width RTL state for record-level NSR CHF ARR AF classification
evidence_type: comparative literature review and fixed RTL evidence
scope: reviewed representative literature and current 30-minute prototype
limitations: not a world-first claim; 24-hour accuracy runtime and power are unverified; physical board benchmark remains pending
allowed_report_sections: 초록; 서론; 관련 연구; 디지털 구조; 논의; 결론

proposed_claim_kr: 단일 스레드 Exact C++ kernel의 360-run 중앙 처리시간은 저장된 1800000 sample당 1777.699800 ms이다
proposed_claim_en: The 360-run median latency of the single-thread Exact C++ kernel is 1777.699800 ms per stored 1800000-sample input
limitations: hand-written transaction-level implementation; single thread fixed affinity; not live observation time

proposed_claim_kr: FPGA active-core는 profile total에서 RUN-state input wait를 뺀 3601290 cycles이며 100 MHz에서 36.012900 ms와 49982089.751172 samples per second이다
proposed_claim_en: FPGA active-core time is 3601290 cycles after subtracting RUN-state input wait from profile total corresponding to 36.012900 ms and 49982089.751172 samples per second at 100 MHz
evidence_type: derived from two measured board hardware counters with XSim cross-check
limitations: core scope and locked counter semantics; not integrated-system latency or live observation time

proposed_claim_kr: Exact C++ kernel 1777.699800 ms를 FPGA active-core 36.012900 ms로 나눈 speedup은 49.362861641x이다
proposed_claim_en: Exact C++ kernel latency of 1777.699800 ms divided by FPGA active-core latency of 36.012900 ms gives a speedup of 49.362861641x
evidence_type: measured CPU divided by latency derived from measured board counters
limitations: core scope only; integrated-system speedup requires preloaded input and an independent timer

proposed_claim_kr: Post-implementation vectorless Vivado 추정전력은 Pure RTL 0.099 W와 MicroBlaze 통합 시스템 0.271 W이며 Pure RTL active energy는 0.003565277100 J per decision이다; integrated-system energy는 미측정이다
proposed_claim_en: Post-implementation vectorless Vivado power is estimated at 0.099 W for Pure RTL and 0.271 W for the MicroBlaze system; Pure RTL active energy is 0.003565277100 J per decision while integrated-system energy is not measured
evidence_type: estimated power and valid derived active-core energy
scope: implementation on-chip estimate and core active energy
limitations: not physical board input power or measured energy; integrated-system energy unavailable; no SAIF or VCD; Medium confidence

proposed_claim_kr: Exact C++ 성능 측정 전 36/36 final prediction 144/144 final membrane 1080/1080 Snapshot boundary 등가성을 확인했고 실보드에서도 36/36 및 144/144 정합을 재확인했다
proposed_claim_en: The benchmark verified 36/36 final predictions 144/144 final membranes and 1080/1080 Snapshot boundaries before Exact C++ timing and reconfirmed 36/36 and 144/144 on hardware
scope: Exact C++ semantic and board replay gate
limitations: functional equivalence does not change classification accuracy

proposed_claim_kr: 고정 RTL에 이르는 개발 이력에서 class_score_neurons의 RDM-to-prediction 병목을 구조적 pipeline으로 분할하고 timing 재검증과 Python RTL FPGA 기능 등가성을 확인했다
proposed_claim_en: The development history leading to the fixed RTL structurally pipelines the class_score_neurons RDM-to-prediction bottleneck and verifies timing plus Python RTL and FPGA functional equivalence
evidence_type: curated Git-history audit and final implementation evidence
scope: historical bottleneck analysis through fixed RTL
limitations: c7c75cf and 5e2e5d0 are ancestor history; historical OOC timing and the roughly 17.5k LUT hotspot are not final implementation metrics and are not directly comparable with final 9719 LUT
allowed_report_sections: 5.6 RTL/IP/FPGA 구현; 8.1 설계적 차별성; hardware docs

proposed_claim_kr: XMODEL-aligned LTspice schematic의 35개 실행은 모두 완료됐고 HPF 0.481174 Hz IA 200.594 V/V 60 Hz notch -83.557 dB LPF 150.211 Hz와 clipping 0을 확인했다
proposed_claim_en: All 35 XMODEL-aligned LTspice runs completed and measured HPF 0.481174 Hz IA 200.594 V per V 60 Hz notch minus 83.557 dB LPF 150.211 Hz and zero clipping
evidence_type: LTspice schematic simulation and compact result tables
scope: LTspice 26.0.1 schematic-level nominal and stress verification
limitations: model and abstraction based; not physical PCB transistor-level post-layout or silicon measurement

proposed_claim_kr: 동일한 10초 ECG 10000표본의 LTspice S/H와 XMODEL signed ADC 비교는 MAE 0.6445 LSB RMS 1.3020 LSB maximum 13 LSB correlation 0.999518 best lag 0과 clipping 0이었다
proposed_claim_en: For the same ten-second ECG and 10000 samples the LTspice sample-hold versus XMODEL signed ADC comparison had MAE 0.6445 LSB RMS 1.3020 LSB maximum 13 LSB correlation 0.999518 best lag zero and zero clipping
evidence_type: team handoff ADC correlation table and figures
scope: patient100 nominal 10 seconds at 1 kSPS signed 12 bit
limitations: representative nominal case; distinct analog solvers are not sample-wise bit exact

proposed_claim_kr: LTspice와 XMODEL의 10000개 ADC code 중 98.74%는 ±5 LSB 99.89%는 ±10 LSB 이내였다
proposed_claim_en: Of 10000 LTspice and XMODEL ADC codes 98.74 percent were within plus or minus 5 LSB and 99.89 percent were within plus or minus 10 LSB
scope: patient100 nominal 10 seconds at 1 kSPS signed 12 bit
limitations: 11 samples exceed 10 LSB and the maximum is 13 LSB; coverage is not bit-exact identity

proposed_claim_kr: 아날로그 검증 흐름은 MATLAB 공칭 설계에서 LTspice schematic 구현 검증을 거쳐 SystemVerilog XMODEL 행동모델과 signed RTL 인계로 이어진다
proposed_claim_en: The analog verification flow proceeds from MATLAB nominal design through LTspice schematic implementation verification to the SystemVerilog XMODEL behavioral model and signed RTL handoff
evidence_type: cross-stage validation report and handoff artifacts
limitations: does not replace physical electrode PCB ADC post-layout or silicon validation
